other: Passively gains {st:Agility} based on {st:Charge} Potency. Works well with {ego:20104}'s passive, allowing him to be Count neutral/positive.
usage: Follows standard {st:Charge} mechanics with Potency, so his skills become stronger then longer the fight lasts.

Gains {st:DriftingDimensionYisang} on his S3 and defense, consumed by his S1 for a coin reuse or when an ally attacks an enemy to follow up with {skill:10116|01}. If consumed by the follow up he gains a {st:FourDimensionYisang}.
Gains {st:FourDimensionYisang} on his S3 and defense or with the effect above. This gives him buffs depending on the number of stacks and goes down by 1 every turn.
Use S3 with 15+ {st:Charge} so you always get the ascended version. It's {st:WideAreaRampage} but deals a small amount of splash damage to all targets.

1011601.desc:
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, deal +(Speed difference x [Charge] Potency on self)% damage (max 20%)

Turn End: Gain ([Charge] Potency on self / 2) [Agility] next turn (max 2; rounded down)
1011601.name: VelocityAndCoordinatesAndVelocity

1011602.desc:
Gain 1 [Charge] Potency every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative [Charge] Count in this Encounter

When another ally's Skill hits an enemy: At Attack End, consume 1 [DriftingDimensionYisang] to activate "Dimensional Slice" against the said target; then, gain 1 [FourDimensionYisang]
1011602.name: Open Alley

1011621.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed uses a Skill that gains or consumes [Charge] Count, gain 1 [Agility] next turn (once per turn)
1011621.name: LetManOutrunEvenTheRayOfLight

data.desc:
[BeforeUse] At 15+ [Charge] Count, activate "Four-dimensional Refraction Time Series Severance" instead
[WhenUse] At 7~14 [Charge] Count:
 - Consume all [Charge] Count and gain Coin Power +1 for every 7 [Charge] Count consumed (max 2)

[WhenUse] Gain 1 [DriftingDimensionYisang] and 1 [FourDimensionYisang]
data.name: Rip Space

data.desc:
[BeforeUse] At 15+ [Charge] Count, activate "Four-dimensional Refraction Time Series Severance" instead
[WhenUse] At 7~14 [Charge] Count:
 - Consume all [Charge] Count and gain Coin Power +1 for every 7 [Charge] Count consumed (max 2)

[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Burst] + [DimensionRift]) on target (max 4)
[WhenUse] Gain 1 [DriftingDimensionYisang] and 1 [FourDimensionYisang]
data.name: Rip Space

data.desc:
[StartBattle] Gain 1 [DriftingDimensionYisang] and 1 [FourDimensionYisang] (once per turn)
 - At 3+ [Charge] Potency, gain 1 additional Stack of the above effects

[StartBattle] At fewer than 7 [Charge] Count, consume (7 - [Charge] Count on self)% HP to gain up to 7 [Charge] Count (this unit's HP cannot drop to 0 due to this effect; rounded down)

[StartBattle] At more than 15 [Charge] Count, consume up to 10 surplus [Charge] Count and apply the following effects:
 - Heal ([Charge] Count consumed)% HP
 - Gain ([Charge] Count consumed / 3) [Agility] next turn (rounded down)
data.name: Sidestep

data.desc:
[StartBattle] Gain [ChargeForceField] equal to [Charge] Potency on self (once per turn; max 5)
[StartBattle] Gain 1 [DriftingDimensionYisang] and 1 [FourDimensionYisang] (once per turn)
 - At 3+ [Charge] Potency, gain 1 additional Stack of the above effects

[StartBattle] At fewer than 7 [Charge] Count, consume (7 - [Charge] Count on self)% HP to gain up to 7 [Charge] Count (this unit's HP cannot drop to 0 due to this effect; rounded down)

[StartBattle] At more than 15 [Charge] Count, consume up to 10 surplus [Charge] Count and apply the following effects:
 - Heal ([Charge] Count consumed)% HP
 - Gain ([Charge] Count consumed / 3) [Agility] next turn (rounded down)
data.name: Sidestep
